zh.lifeSummary: John Barrett是Nicholass Barrett和Phillippi Winseade的兒子，於1562年出生在英國史洛普爾沃費爾德。他於大約1585年與Jenor Wallacomb在英國肯特阿福德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1644年在英國諾福爾可諾維其享年82歲，埋葬在英國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: John Barrett是Nicholass Barrett和Phillippi Winseade的儿子，于1562年出生在英国史洛普爾沃費爾德。他于大约1585年与Jenor Wallacomb在英国肯特阿福德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1644年在英国諾福爾可諾維其享年82岁，埋葬在英国。

nameMeanings.name: Barrett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): probably a nickname for a quarrelsome person, from Old French barat, Middle English bar(r)at, bar(r)et(te) ‘trouble, distress’, later ‘deception, fraud; contention, strife’. Through Norman settlement it also became common in Ireland, where it was Gaelicized as Baróid (Munster) and Baréid (Connacht).

variants.name: Barret
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Matthieu, Mirlande, Philippe.

French: derivative of the topographic name   Barre   1 ‘barrier’, or a habitational name from a place called with this word. This surname (in any of the two possible senses; see also 3 below) is also found in Haiti.

variants.name: Baratta
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Carmine, Pasquale, Alfonse, Antonio, Carmela, Guido, Salvatore, Vincenzo.
Italian: occupational name for a market trader, especially in northern Italy, from baratta ‘exchange, sale, buying and selling’, a derivative of barattare ‘to barter’. See also Barrett .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: John Barrett was born in 1562, in Worfield, Shropshire, England as the son of Nicholass Barrett and Phillippi Winseade. He married Jenor Wallacomb about 1585, in Ashford, Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1644, in Norwich, Norfolk, England, at the age of 82, and was buried in England.

fr.lifeSummary: John Barrett est né en 1562, à Worfield, Shropshire, Angleterre, fils de Nicholass Barrett et Phillippi Winseade. Il a épousé Jenor Wallacomb environ 1585, à Ashford, Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1644, à Norwich, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 82 ans, et a été enterré à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: John Barrett wurde 1562 in Worfield, Shropshire, England, als Sohn von Nicholass Barrett und Phillippi Winseade geboren. Er hat um 1585 in Ashford, Kent, England Jenor Wallacomb geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1644 im Alter von 82 Jahren in Norwich, Norfolk, England und wurde in England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: John Barrett è nato il nel 1562 nel Worfield, Shropshire, England come figlio di Nicholass Barrett e Phillippi Winseade. Lui sposato Jenor Wallacomb circa 1585, nel Ashford, Kent, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1644, nel Norwich, Norfolk, England, all'età di 82 anni, e fu sepolto a England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Barrettは1562年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアウオルフィールドでNicholass BarrettとPhillippi Winseadeの息子として生まれた。約1585年にイギリスケントアシュフォードでJenor Wallacombと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1644年にイギリスノーフォルクノーウィチで82歳で死去し，イギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Barrett(은)는 1562년 영국 슈럽실르 워필드에서 Nicholass Barrett(와)과 Phillippi Winseade의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1585년 영국 켄트 애스h퍼드에서 Jenor Wallacomb(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1644년 영국 노르폴크 노위치에서 82세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: John Barrett nasceu em 1562, em Worfield, Shropshire, Inglaterra filho de Nicholass Barrett e Phillippi Winseade. Ele casou-se com Jenor Wallacomb aproximadamente 1585, em Ashford, Kent, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1644, em Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 82 anos, e foi sepultado em Inglaterra.

ro.of Saint Tudy, Cornwall, England: St Tudy, Cornwall, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: John Barrett родился в 1562 г. в местности ворфиелд, шропшир, Англия. Его родителей звали Nicholass Barrett и Phillippi Winseade. Он женился на женщине по имени Jenor Wallacomb около 1585 г. в местности ашфорд, кэнт, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1644 г. в местности норвич, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 82 лет и был похоронен в местности Англия.
